statement: NVIDIA Q1 FY2027 Data Center revenue was a record $75.2 billion, up 92% year over year and up 21% quarter over quarter.
why: Data Center GPU demand accelerated sharply on agentic AI and inference workloads.

impact.mechanism: Record DC revenue and 92% YoY growth signal surging demand for NVIDIA accelerators.

evidence.source: NVIDIA Q1 FY2027 financial results press release (Form 8-K / NVIDIA IR)
evidence.excerpt: Record Data Center revenue of $75.2 billion, up 92% from a year ago and up 21% from the previous quarter.

confidence.basis: primary NVIDIA press release / Form 8-K reported figure
